title: BTS Bus Tracking System
description: A real-time transit tracker designed to eliminate long wait times for campus and public transit routes. Users can monitor active vehicles, coordinate arrivals, and view visual routes.
features: Dynamic search and routing for specific numbers
Estimated arrival schedules based on vehicle speed
challenges: Handling GPS API rate limits, where location updates were restricted to one request every 30 seconds. The challenge was balancing real-time tracking expectations with efficient API usage and application reliability.
learning: Gained experience in real-time data streaming, geospatial mapping, and integrating multiple APIs to create a seamless user experience (The app is in progress and will be launch soon).

title: VIBE IDE
tagline: The Visual Intent Build Engine - Integrated Development Environment
description: Convert simple Human readable text into UI elements with original raw codes (html, css, js, py). It bridges the gap between intent and code by using human-readable syntax.
features: Human-readable syntax for UI element creation
challenges: Developing a custom parser that accurately interprets human-readable syntax and translates it into functional code, while ensuring compatibility across different programming languages.
learning: Enhanced skills in parser development, code generation techniques, and cross-language compatibility, while also gaining insights into user experience design for development tools.

title: IoT Second Layer Password Security System
description: A micro-controller security platform deploying a secondary authentication gate on OS Layer. Requires authorization via physical hardware before granting access.
features: Secondary authentication layer for enhanced security
Integration with standard desktop operating systems
challenges: Interfacing microcontrollers with standard desktop operating system credential gates reliably without native driver dependencies.
learning: Obtained skills in hardware-to-software serial protocols, embedded memory constraints, and cryptographic safety protocols.

title: Intelligent News Generator
description: An automated compiler aggregating feed indexes across global endpoints. Summarizes current trends into structured logs matching selected technical subjects.
features: Summarization of current trends into structured logs
Customizable subject filters for targeted content
challenges: Managing diverse feed formats and ensuring accurate parsing and summarization while maintaining performance and reliability.
learning: Developed expertise in feed aggregation, data parsing, and automated content generation, while also learning to handle various data formats and structures effectively.

title: Syco App
description: A personality analyzer that evaluates user input and provides insights into their personality traits, preferences, and behavioral tendencies.
features: User-friendly interface for input and analysis
Insights into behavioral tendencies and preferences
challenges: Ensuring accurate personality analysis based on user input while maintaining a responsive and intuitive user interface.
learning: Gained experience in user interface design and the application of psychological principles in software development.
